subject: Re: LSJ Sugar mill lights and other areas
body:
copper finsh 2 half feet.,,thanks


----- Original Message ----
From: "Miles Alexander, LSJ" <littlestjames@yahoo.com>
To: Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>; Daphne Wallace <daphnelwallace@yahoo.com>; Jeffery E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, January 18, 2007 2:15:06 PM
Subject: LSJ Sugar mill lights and other areas


Greetings
The sugar mill walls are almost complete.
 
I visited the two main lighting suppliers to see what they stocked in terms of large bronze or copper lights. The attached are what I thought may be suitable.
 
The slotted light is the same used at the heli pad. I can use these to replace the lights going down to the MBR and the entrance steps. The current lights are not appropriate.
 
The down light is the flood light that will shine down the walls of the sugar mill. The large lights will be placed on the sides of the large window.
 
Please advise
 
Miles



Mr Miles Alexander 
Little St James Island, 6100 Red Hook Qrts B3, St Thomas, USVI, USA. 00802-1348
Phone : 340-5139855, Fax : 340-7758108, Email : littlestjames@yahoo.com
